title: Application Support Analyst (In-house App, Tech MNC)
description:
Position Overview

Working within the Embedded SRE organisation, the role will be expected to perform the RTB (run the business) activities for the business that we support. The Application Support Analyst will be expected to work on on-call rotations to handle, triage and escalate on alarms and issues that may arise during their shift. During periods where the analyst is not on rotation, the analyst is expected to perform other RTB activities, including but not limited to generating reports on the various kinds of operational workloads, reviewing capacity needs of the business, supporting and/or driving disaster recovery response drills, and supporting deployments.


Job Responsibilities

The application support analyst will handle the day-to-day operations of the business. The candidate will need to demonstrate a structured and analytical approach to the identification, diagnosis and rectification of issues.

  • Provide level 1 troubleshooting support and response, and be on standby up to 12h a day during the week of standby
  • Log, escalate and follow through with issues, ensuring that issues are resolved
  • Review and improve our alarms and alarm response
  • Periodic reviews and submission of the capacity needs of the business
  • Support and/or drive disaster recovery response drills
  • Deploy new versions of the software

Requirements

  • Diploma/Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or other highly technical, scientific discipline
  • 1-3 years of Technical / Application Support experience on various technology platforms
  • Responsible and proactive approach to resolving problems, and being able to have a structured approach to problem solving
  • Basic programming in Python and SQL is a plus.

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Employment Agency License No.: 02C3423
